name: Quantum Buds Pro
description: Next-generation wireless earbuds featuring active hybrid noise cancellation, high-fidelity audio, and up to 36 hours of battery life with the wireless charging case.

name: AeroGrip Gaming Mouse
description: Ultra-lightweight ergonomic wireless gaming mouse with a 26K DPI optical sensor, optical switches, and zero-latency wireless connectivity.

name: Nebula mechanical Keyboard
description: 75% layout premium mechanical keyboard with pre-lubed linear switches, hot-swappable sockets, double-shot PBT keycaps, and customizable RGB backlighting.

name: Horizon Smartwatch
description: A sleek, premium smartwatch with an AMOLED always-on display, health diagnostics tracking, built-in GPS, and comprehensive athletic metrics.

name: Vanguard Leather Backpack
description: Crafted from full-grain leather, this water-resistant backpack features a padded 16-inch laptop compartment, luggage pass-through, and hidden anti-theft pockets.

name: Lumina Smart Desk Lamp
description: Minimalist LED desk lamp featuring touch-sensitive controls, adjustable color temperature, brightness slider, and an integrated 15W wireless charging base.

name: Nomad Insulated Flask
description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps beverages ice-cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours. Sweat-free powder coat finish.

name: Apex Active Hoodie
description: Premium athletic hoodie engineered from moisture-wicking four-way stretch fabric. Features zip-secure pockets, scuba-style hood, and thumbholes for active warmth.
